memberdef.type: std::map< std::string, std::shared_ptr< std::pair< std::shared_ptr< std::vector< char > >, std::shared_ptr< std::vector< char > > > > >
memberdef.name: cidData_

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< sgns::crdt::GlobalDB > db, size_t maximalProcessingSubTaskCount, TokenID tokenId)
memberdef.name: ProcessingCoreImpl

detaileddescription.para:
Process a single subtask.
subTask
- Subtask that needs to be processed.
initialHashCode
- Initial hash code used to calculate result hash.

Get current processing progress.
Progress percentage (0.0 to 100.0).

briefdescription.para: Default implementation of ProcessingCore backed by GlobalDB.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >
